channel.title: ML-Biomat
channel.description: Tutorials, research notes, and practical guides on ML and multiscale modeling for fiber-based biomaterials. | 纤维生物·材料·结构的机器学习与多尺度模拟教程、研究笔记和实战指南。

item.title: NetworkX Fundamentals: Understanding, Building, and Analyzing Networks with Python
item.description: A complete hands-on introduction to NetworkX: from graph theory fundamentals to network construction, analysis metrics, and visualization.

item.title: Engineered Superstructures: Origami, Honeycomb, Auxetic, Helical, and Lattice Design in 2D and 3D
item.description: A comprehensive review of engineered superstructures across ten deep sections.

item.title: Hierarchical Superstructures in Biomaterials: Mechanical Design from Molecules to Macroscale
item.description: A navigational guide to hierarchical superstructures in biomaterials: silk fibroin, collagen, bone, nacre, spider silk, and cellulose analyzed through their structure-mechanics relationships.

item.title: NetworkX 基础：用 Python 理解、构建与分析网络
item.description: NetworkX 完整入门教程：从图论基础概念到网络构建、分析指标计算和可视化，手把手教你用 Python 理解网络科学。

item.title: 工程超结构力学综述：折纸、蜂巢、拉胀、扭转与点阵的二维三维设计
item.description: 工程超结构力学的深度综述，十个深度章节覆盖全部主要类型。

item.title: 生物材料的层级超结构：从分子到宏观的力学设计
item.description: 生物材料从分子到宏观尺度的层级超结构导览：丝素蛋白、胶原蛋白、骨、珍珠层、蜂蜨丝等自然材料的结构-力学关系解析。

item.title: GROMACS Molecular Dynamics Tutorial: From Structure Preparation to Trajectory Analysis
item.description: A complete hands-on tutorial for GROMACS molecular dynamics simulation, covering installation, system preparation, energy minimization, equilibration, production MD, and trajectory analysis (RMSD/RMSF/Rg/H-bonds) using lysozyme as a worked example.

item.title: GROMACS分子动力学模拟实战：从结构准备到轨迹分析
item.description: GROMACS分子动力学模拟的完整实战教程：以溶菌酶为例演示从结构准备到轨迹分析的全流程

item.title: SciPy曲线拟合完全指南：从线性回归到非线性建模
item.description: 面向材料科学和生物学研究生的SciPy曲线拟合完整教程：线性回归、指数衰减、Hertz压痕模型、置信区间估计和模型选择。

item.title: Python科研绘图完全指南：从数据到发表级图表
item.description: 材料/生物研究生必备的Matplotlib科研绘图教程：多幅子图、散点图、热力图、统计图表、色彩方案和发表级导出。

item.title: Python科研工具箱完全指南：材料科学与生物研究必备
item.description: 面向材料/生物研究生的完整Python科研工具指南：从NumPy数据处理到Matplotlib发表级作图，含ASE原子模拟和skimage图像分析。

item.title: Python科学计算环境完全搭建指南：从零到生产力
item.description: 面向生物和材料研究生的Python环境搭建完全指南：Miniconda安装、环境管理、Jupyter配置、VS Code集成和常见问题解决。

item.title: Pandas实验数据处理实战：从原始数据到统计分析
item.description: 面向材料科学和生物学研究生的Pandas数据处理教程：数据读取、清洗、分组统计、合并和导出。

item.title: NumPy完全入门：实验室数据处理必备
item.description: 面向材料科学和生物学研究生的NumPy完全入门教程：从数组创建到实验数据加载、统计分析、线性拟合和批量处理。

item.title: Understanding Stress-Strain Curves: A Materials Science Primer
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to interpreting stress-strain curves: elastic modulus, yield strength, ultimate strength, toughness, and how these concepts apply to soft biomaterials.

item.title: Silk Fibroin: From Molecular Structure to Mechanical Function
item.description: How silk fibroin's hierarchical structure—from amino acid sequence to beta-sheet crystallites—dictates its remarkable mechanical properties and guides biomaterials design.

item.title: Practical SEM Image Analysis for Biomaterials Research
item.description: How to analyze SEM images of fiber networks with Python: thresholding, fiber measurement, orientation analysis, and batch processing using scikit-image.

item.title: Practical Curve Fitting with SciPy: From Basics to Advanced Models
item.description: A comprehensive guide to curve fitting with SciPy for materials and biology researchers. Linear regression, exponential decay, Hertz indentation, viscoelastic models, with complete code and real examples.

item.title: Scientific Data Visualization with Python: Publication-Ready Figures
item.description: How to create publication-quality figures with Matplotlib and Seaborn: multi-panel layouts, color schemes, high-res export, and common chart types for materials research.

item.title: Setting Up Your Python Environment for Scientific Computing: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Complete guide to setting up a Python environment for materials and biology research: Miniconda, Jupyter, VS Code, package management, and troubleshooting common issues.
